title: CORVALLIS WATER LOW-INCOME ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF CORVALLIS CORVALLIS WATER LOW-INCOME ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a reduction on base rate of monthly charge for water of up to $68.74 each month. Household must renew annually. 501 SW Madison Avenue Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Households must be receiving one of the following benefit programs and are single-dwelling residential customers of the City of Corvallis: OHP, SNAP, or Corvallis School District 509J household direct certification Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 766-6990 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6990 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more infomation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of benefit program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Corvallis SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Free 2-hour visitor parking is available in lot west of City Hall Services: Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF CORVALLIS CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LIVABILITY CODE ENFORCEMENT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR LOAN PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF CORVALLIS
